gatewayRequired: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

welcome.title: MatchaClaw Chat
welcome.subtitle: Your AI assistant is ready. Start a conversation below.

input.messagePlaceholder: Message (Type / to see skills, Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)

errors.activeRunDisconnected: The active run disconnected before a terminal event was received.
errors.modelUnavailable: The current model is unavailable. Please try again later or switch models.
errors.gatewayAuthRequired: The OpenClaw Gateway requires authentication. Check your authentication configuration.
errors.gatewayAuthFailed: OpenClaw Gateway authentication failed. Check your credentials or authentication configuration.
errors.gatewayTokenMissing: The OpenClaw Gateway access token is missing.
errors.gatewayTokenMismatch: The OpenClaw Gateway access token does not match.
errors.gatewayAuthRateLimited: Too many OpenClaw Gateway authentication failures. Please try again later.
errors.gatewayPairingRequired: This device must be paired with the OpenClaw Gateway before it can connect.
errors.gatewayOriginNotAllowed: This origin is not allowed by the OpenClaw Gateway. Check the Control UI allowed origins configuration.
errors.gatewayDeviceIdentityRequired: This connection is missing device identity verification. Check your HTTPS/localhost or device identity configuration.
errors.gatewayConnectTimeout: Connection to the OpenClaw Gateway timed out.
errors.gatewayConnectFailed: Failed to connect to the OpenClaw Gateway: {{reason}}
errors.gatewayHeartbeatTimeout: The connection to the OpenClaw Gateway timed out and is waiting to recover.
errors.gatewaySocketClosed: The connection to the OpenClaw Gateway was closed (code {{code}}, reason: {{reason}}).

executionGraph.title: Execution Graph
executionGraph.userTriggerHint: Triggered by the user message above
executionGraph.agentReplyHint: Jump to the assistant reply below

skillPreviewNotFound: Could not find this skill. Open the skill list to refresh it.

taskInbox.title: Task Inbox
taskInbox.gatewayStopped: Gateway is stopped; task list and resume actions are unavailable
taskInbox.empty: No unfinished tasks in current workspace
taskInbox.unboundSession: No bound session yet, resume task first
taskInbox.taskNotFound: Task not found or updated, please refresh
